_meta.role: 活潑的男吟遊詩人，眼帶笑意；Nan 之夫；與妻共同教授年輕詩人作曲、演奏、即興；個性開朗、愛打趣。

translations.en: a lively bard with laughter in his eyes.
translations.zh: 一名眼帶笑意、活潑開朗的吟遊詩人。

translations.en: "Welcome, $G! I am Sir Kenneth, and I'd gladly play a @song for thee."
translations.zh: 「歡迎，$G！在下肯尼斯爵士，願為汝奏一曲@song（歌）。」

translations.en: "@Kenneth's my name - don't wear it out."
"I asked you not to wear it out! It's the only name I've got."
translations.zh: 「都說了別叫得太勤！這可是我唯一的名字啊。」

translations.en: "My @wife and I teach young bards the arts of composition, performance, and improvisation."
translations.zh: 「在下與@wife內人教導年輕詩人作曲、演奏與即興之藝。」

translations.note: keyword list；最後 conc → 會（音樂會）

translations.en: "Bards must be well versed in such matters."
translations.zh: 「吟遊之人於此等事務皆須通曉。」

translations.en: "Her name is Nan. Whatever you do, don't say anything to her about @spiders..."
translations.zh: 「她叫@spiders（南）。汝萬萬不可在她面前提及蜘蛛之事……」

translations.en: "She has quite an @imagination. Sometimes she lets it carry her away."
translations.zh: 「她@imagination（想像）力豐沛，有時竟被自己的幻想牽著走。」

translations.en: "Usually it doesn't give her any trouble."
translations.zh: 「平日裡倒也未曾為她惹來麻煩。」

translations.en: "Yes, I know of the @Rune and @Mantra of Compassion."
translations.zh: 「是的，在下知曉@Rune（符文）之@Mantra（真言）與真言。」

translations.en: "I've been trying to work the Mantra of Compassion into a song - but I don't know what '@mu' means."
translations.zh: 「在下一直想把慈悲真言譜進歌中——只是還不知『@mu』究竟何意。」

translations.en: "@Ariana has the rune, and they could hardly have found a sweeter child to give it to."
translations.zh: 「符文在@Ariana（艾莉）安娜手中，再也找不出比她更乖巧的孩子來託付了。」

translations.en: "Once in a great while a student comes along with such a gift for learning that one need but offer a little guidance and step back to watch them learn."
translations.zh: 「難得一回，會出現一位天賦異稟的學徒，為師者只消稍加指點，便可退後一步，看著他自個兒領悟成才。」

translations.en: "To have such students is the most rewarding part of a teacher's job, and Ariana is one such."
translations.zh: 「能收到這般學徒，便是為師者最大的慰藉，艾莉安娜正是其一。」

translations.en: Kenneth plays a delightful little melody for you.
translations.zh: 肯尼斯為汝奏了一段悅耳的小調。

translations.en: "I like the confused look on your face too much to ruin it by telling you."
translations.zh: 「汝臉上那困惑的神情實在有趣，告訴汝便煞了風景了。」

translations.en: "Hmmmm... No, I don't think that's it."

riddles_additions.en: Kenneth's my name - don't wear it out. / I asked you not to wear it out! It's the only name I've got.
riddles_additions.zh: 在下肯尼斯——別叫得太勤了。／都說了別叫得太勤！這可是我唯一的名字啊。
riddles_additions.ref: 英文俚語 'don't wear it out'（別把名字叫到磨損）；Kenneth 招牌笑話
riddles_additions.strategy: 意譯為『別叫得太勤』，保留俚語的幽默回擊感

riddles_additions.en: I've been trying to work the Mantra of Compassion into a song - but I don't know what '@mu' means. / Nobody I know does either.
riddles_additions.zh: 在下一直想把慈悲真言譜進歌中——只是還不知『mu』究竟何意。／在下相識者亦無人知曉。
riddles_additions.ref: 禪宗『無門關』之『無/mu』；Kenneth 不知此哲學典故，遂成笑點
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留 mu ASCII（與 Mariah 真言系統一致），笑點留給玩家自行體會

translator_notes: Kenneth 個性活潑，自稱『在下』偶爾插科打諢。與 Nan 配對；提及妻子的句子用『內人』雅稱，呼應吟遊詩人氣質。多次提到 Ariana 為得意門生，譯文用『學徒』『為師』保留師徒語感。'mu' 保留 ASCII。
